title: Hello World
description: 第一篇 Velite 測試文章
body: const{Fragment:n,jsx:e,jsxs:t}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const c={h1:"h1",p:"p",...r.components};return t(n,{children:[e(c.h1,{children:"我的第一篇測試"}),"\n",e(c.p,{children:"這裡是文章內容，恭喜成功！"})]})}return{default:function(n={}){const{wrapper:t}=n.components||{};return t?e(t,{...n,children:e(_createMdxContent,{...n})}):_createMdxContent(n)}};

title: 建立 Next.js 15 + Velite 部落格的心得
description: 記錄使用 Next.js 15 和 Velite 建立現代化部落格的完整過程，包含遇到的問題和解決方案
body:
const{Fragment:n,jsx:e,jsxs:r}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(t){const l={h1:"h1",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...t.components};return r(n,{children:[e(l.h1,{children:"建立 Next.js 15 + Velite 部落格的心得"}),"
",e(l.p,{children:"今天（2025年9月20日）終於完成了用 Next.js 15 和 Velite 建立部落格的基礎設定，想記錄一下整個過程中學到的東西。"}),"
",e(l.h2,{children:"為什麼選擇這個技術組合？"}),"
",e(l.h3,{children:"Next.js 15 的優勢"}),"
",r(l.ul,{children:["
",r(l.li,{children:[e(l.strong,{children:"App Router"}),"：新的檔案系統路由更直觀"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[e(l.strong,{children:"Server Components"}),"：更好的效能和 SEO"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[e(l.strong,{children:"內建優化"}),"：圖片、字體、腳本自動優化"]}),"
",r(l.li,{children:[e(l.strong,{children:"TypeScript 整合"}),"：開發體驗極佳"]}),"
"]}),"
",e(l.h3,{children:"Velite vs Contentlayer"}),"
",e(l.p,{children:"原本考慮用 Contentlayer（看了很多 2022 年的教學），但後來發現："}),"
",r(l.ul,{children:["
",e(l.li,{children:"Contentlayer 已經不太維護了"}),"
",e(l.li,{children:"Velite 是更現代的替代方案"}),"
",e(l.li,{children:"支援 MDX、型別安全、熱更新"}),"
",e(l.li,{children:"配置更簡潔，不需要複雜的適配器"}),"
"]}),"
",e(l.h2,{children:"實際遇到的問題"}),"
",e(l.h3,{children:"1. YAML Frontmatter 格式問題"})]})}return{default:function(n={}){const{wrapper:r}=n.components||{};return r?e(r,{...n,children:e(_createMdxContent,{...n})}):_createMdxContent(n)}};
